SELECT
    t.account_id,
    (SELECT MAX(t2.account_id) FROM trans t2 WHERE t2.account_id = t.account_id) AS oldest_account_id,
    (SELECT MIN(t2.account_id) FROM trans t2 WHERE t2.account_id = t.account_id) AS lowest_account_id,
    (SELECT AVG(t2.balance) FROM trans t2 WHERE t2.account_id = t.account_id) AS avg_salary,
    (SELECT AVG(t2.balance) FROM trans t2 WHERE t2.account_id = (SELECT MAX(t2.account_id) FROM trans t2 WHERE t2.account_id = t.account_id)) AS highest_avg_salary,
    (SELECT AVG(t2.balance) FROM trans t2 WHERE t2.account_id = (SELECT MAX(t2.account_id) FROM trans t2 WHERE t2.account_id = t.account_id)) AS gap
FROM trans t
WHERE t.gender = 'F'
GROUP BY t.account_id
HAVING AVG(t.balance) = (SELECT AVG(t2.balance) FROM trans t2 WHERE t2.account_id = (SELECT MAX(t2.account_id) FROM trans t2 WHERE t2.account_id = t.account_id))
ORDER BY avg_salary ASC;

JOIN client ON loan.account

SELECT
  b.bond_type,
  COUNT(*) AS bond_count,
  CASE
    WHEN m.label = 'TR010' THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END AS is_carcinogenic
FROM `bond` b
JOIN `atom` a ON b.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
JOIN `molecule` m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a.atom_id = 'TR010'
GROUP BY b.bond_type
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
  SELECT MAX(COUNT(bond_type))
  FROM `bond` b2
  JOIN `atom` a2 ON b2.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
  WHERE a2.atom_id = 'TR010'
)
AND m.label = 'TR010'
ORDER BY bond_count DESC;

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
        THEN SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
        ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
    END AS difference
FROM superhero s

JOIN superpower sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id;

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN COUNT(ID) where SEX = 'M' and Admission = '+' > COUNT(ID) where SEX = 'M' and Admission = '-' THEN 'in-patient'
        ELSE 'outpatient'
    END AS PatientType,
    ROUND(
        (COUNT(ID) where SEX = 'M' and Admission = '+' * 100.0 / COUNT(ID) where SEX = 'M' and Admission = '-'),
        2
    ) AS Percentage
FROM
    Examination
WHERE
    Examination Date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
    CASE
        WHEN COUNT(ID) where SEX = 'M' and Admission = '+' > COUNT(ID) where SEX = 'M' and Admission = '-' THEN 'in-patient'
        ELSE 'outpatient'
    END;
normalized_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(ID) where SEX = 'M' and Admission = '+' > COUNT(ID) where SEX = 'M' and Admission = '-' THEN 'in-patient' ELSE 'outpatient' END AS PatientType, ROUND( (COUNT(ID) where SEX = 'M' and Admission = '+' * 100.0 / COUNT(ID) where SEX = 'M' and Admission = '-'), 2 ) AS Percentage FROM Examination WHERE Examination Date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CASE WHEN COUNT(ID) where SEX = 'M' and Admission = '+' > COUNT(ID) where SEX = 'M' and Admission = '-' THEN 'in-patient' ELSE 'outpatient' END

    CASE

            AND (SUBTRACT(year(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), year(P.Birthday)) > 0)

        ELSE NULL

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN c.Segment = 'SME' THEN 'SME'
        WHEN c.Segment = 'LAM' THEN 'LAM'
        WHEN c.Segment = 'KAM' THEN 'KAM'
    END AS Segment,
    CASE
        WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IsEUR,
        (
            SELECT
                SUM(
                    (
                        SELECT
                            SUM(Consumption)
                        FROM yearmonth
                        WHERE CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
                            AND Year = 2013
                    ) -
                    SUM(
                        (
                            SELECT
                                SUM(Consumption)
                            FROM yearmonth
                            WHERE CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
                                AND Year = 2012
                        )
                    )
                ) /
                (
                    SELECT
                        SUM(Consumption)
                    FROM yearmonth
                    WHERE CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
                        AND Year = 2013
                ) * 100
            FROM yearmonth ym
            WHERE ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        ) AS PercentageIncrease
FROM customers
normalized_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN c.Segment = 'SME' THEN 'SME' WHEN c.Segment = 'LAM' THEN 'LAM' WHEN c.Segment = 'KAM' THEN 'KAM' END AS Segment, CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IsEUR, ( SELECT SUM( ( SELECT SUM(Consumption) FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = ym.CustomerID AND Year = 2013 ) - SUM( ( SELECT SUM(Consumption) FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = ym.CustomerID AND Year = 2012 ) ) ) / ( SELECT SUM(Consumption) FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = ym.CustomerID AND Year = 2013 ) * 100 FROM yearmonth ym WHERE ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID ) AS PercentageIncrease FROM customers

LIMIT 1;
